Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails for NorthWind, Raj Patel, Victor Huang, chain-of-custody, and related terms using search_emails (query: "NorthWind" or "Raj Patel" or "Victor Huang" or "chain-of-custody" or similar). Expected findings: Catalina's NorthWind account update email (email_catalina_david_northwind_update) confirming Blessing assigned as coordinator for both Denver moves, Chloe's assignment emails referencing the chain-of-custody requirement and Victor Huang's IT security escort, and any vendor correspondence with Swift about hazmat handling. Also finds Victor Huang's security breach email regarding the Raj Patel server lab relocation referenced in the NorthWind retention Linear ticket.
OE 2: Search emails for Emilia Cruz, KeyMove, Craig Nguyen, piano, Steinway, and related terms using search_emails (query: "Emilia Cruz" or "Craig Nguyen" or "KeyMove" or "piano" or "Steinway" or similar). Expected findings: Craig Nguyen's damage photos email to Blessing (email_email_1f1459bff84c), Marcus Thorne's email referencing "Blessing's note that the walkup assessment was insufficient" (email_email_99e10a978b48), and any insurance claim correspondence.
OE 3: Search emails for Lily Marchetti, Heartland, Jake Loomis, and cancellation-related terms using search_emails (query: "Lily Marchetti" or "Heartland" or "Jake Loomis" or "Marchetti cancellation" or similar). Expected findings: The original cancellation email sent to Jake Loomis on February 10, 2026, and critically, NO acknowledgment reply from Heartland Movers. Also finds references to the Heartland Q1 billing dispute (HM-2026-Q1-0042) where the Marchetti line item ($1,600) is one of three disputed charges.
OE 4: Search Slack for NorthWind, chain-of-custody, piano, Emilia Cruz, and Raj Patel discussions using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "NorthWind" or "chain-of-custody" or "piano" or "Emilia Cruz" or "Raj Patel" or similar). Expected findings: Blessing's April 12 admission of responsibility for the piano damage in #operations (ts=1775976300.000000), Blessing's April 13 note about Swift driver pushback on new DOT paperwork (ts=1776071700.000000), Chloe's April 10 response to Catalina with vendor assessment for both NorthWind Denver moves, confirming Blessing as coordinator and noting Swift capabilities and chain-of-custody gaps (ts=1775858880.000000), Catalina's April 11 NorthWind account recovery post in #customer-engagement, and the NorthWind retention discussion in #executive.
OE 5: Search CRM for NorthWind Technologies company record using crm_search_companies (name: "NorthWind" or "NorthWind Technologies"). Expected findings: company_northwind, Manufacturing Tech, Chicago IL, 150 employees. The company record provides the company_id needed for deal and engagement lookups.
OE 6: Search CRM for NorthWind deals using crm_search_deals (dealname: "NorthWind" or company_id from OE 5 result). Expected findings: deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 ($14,700, contractSent, Raj Patel + Emilia Cruz), deal_northwind (original $60,000 enterprise deal), deal_northwind_won (same deal at closedWon), and deal_northwind_denver_expansion (earlier version of the Denver deal at qualifiedToBuy, $14,700). The Denver expansion v2 deal description contains the full scope: chain-of-custody protocol, Gentle Giant Piano Movers subcontractor (no existing vendor agreement), $1,700 in provisional line items ($1,200 chain-of-custody protocol estimate + $500 lease negotiation, both pending vendor/scope confirmation), and NorthWind Q1 CSAT 5/10 account recovery context.
OE 7: List CRM engagements for NorthWind using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: [company_northwind]). Expected findings: eng_northwind_denver_recovery_context, confirms Blessing Okafor as coordinator for both NorthWind Denver moves, Q1 CSAT 5/10, Pam Kowalski escalated to David Chen, chain-of-custody protocol unprecedented for MoveOps, Gentle Giant Piano Movers has no existing vendor agreement, 27-day lease overlap, Catalina Dubois as AM.
OE 8: Search Airtable for Raj Patel relocation record using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Raj Patel"). Expected findings: recRajPatelChicagoDenver, Status: In Progress, Chicago to Denver, April 21-23, Special Requirements: 4 rack-mounted servers (~2,400 lbs), lithium UPS batteries requiring Class 9 hazmat handling and DOT-certified transport, CISO-mandated chain-of-custody log, NorthWind IT security escort must supervise all packing/loading, direct transport only (NO interim warehouse storage), real-time GPS tracking, full disk encryption verification before packing. Notes that MoveOps has NO prior chain-of-custody experience. Also returns a second record, recRajPatelAuditNote0411, showing Move Start Date: April 10 (vs planned April 21-23), Coordinator: Fatimah Al-Rashidi, and a critical note: "Escort confirmed for 9:00 AM — movers arrived at 7:00 AM and loaded without waiting." This audit record reveals the actual breach timeline and contradicts the planned dates in the primary record.
OE 9: Search Airtable for Emilia Cruz relocation record using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Emilia Cruz"). Expected findings: recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver, Status: In Progress, Chicago to Denver, April 14-18, Special Requirements: Steinway Model B grand piano (7ft, 480 lbs), specialty piano movers required (Heartland and Swift do NOT handle pianos), Gentle Giant Piano Movers (Chicago) as potential subcontractor with NO existing vendor agreement, three-vendor coordination, 27-day lease overlap, hard deadline April 18.
OE 10: Search Airtable for Lily Marchetti relocation record(s) using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Lily Marchetti" or "Marchetti"). Expected findings: TWO records with conflicting statuses, recReloc00000002 showing "Completed" (Nashville to Chicago, April 25-26) and rec_reloc_marchetti showing "Cancelled" (employee decided not to relocate, cancellation sent to Jake Loomis on 2/10, no vendor acknowledgment). This data inconsistency is a key finding the agent must discover and report.
OE 11: Search Linear for Lily Marchetti tickets using linear_list_issues (query: "Lily Marchetti" or "Marchetti" or assignee: "moveops_blessing_okafor" with project: "proj_canopy"). Expected findings: Three open tickets assigned to Blessing Okafor, #304 issue_canopy_marchetti_apt "Apartment Search - Lily Marchetti - Chicago" (state: state_in_progress), #305 issue_canopy_marchetti_flight "Flight Booking - Lily Marchetti - BNA to ORD" (state: state_todo), #306 issue_canopy_marchetti_movers "Moving Coordination - Lily Marchetti - Nashville to Chicago" (state: state_todo). All three should be closed/cancelled since the relocation was cancelled on February 10.
OE 12: Search Linear for NorthWind-related issues using linear_list_issues (query: "NorthWind" or "Raj Patel" or "Emilia Cruz"). Expected findings: issue_dot_docs_patel_northwind (#3, "DOT Docs - Raj Patel / NorthWind / Lithium UPS", state: done, all 4 DOT documentation categories verified complete), linear_issue_c8cdba4408f1 (#482, "NorthWind retention response plan after April escalations", assigned to David Chen, references Victor Huang security breach, escort mismatch, overnight storage, missing custody-log). The agent should identify gaps: no dedicated ticket for Emilia Cruz piano damage resolution or insurance claim tracking, which is a NorthWind coordination gap that needs a new tracking ticket per the prompt's request.
OE 13: Search QuickBooks for KeyMove bill or piano insurance claim using quickbooks_search_bills (criteria related to "KeyMove" or DocNumber "KM-44192-ICR" or similar). Expected findings: BILL-KEYMOVE-2026-0417, $1,200 insurance claim rider for Emilia Cruz Steinway piano scratch during stairwell extraction, from KeyMove Specialty Transport (VEND-KEYMOVE-001), transaction date April 17, 2026, due date April 24, 2026, categorized under Claims & Remediation Expense (ACC-6185). This confirms the insurance claim IS being handled and the amount is $1,200, answering Blessing's question about whether there is still a financial gap.
OE 14: Look up Chloe Vance's email address using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Chloe Vance" or "Chloe"). Expected finding: chloe.vance@moveops.com.
OE 15: Look up Blessing Okafor's email address using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Blessing Okafor" or "Blessing"). Expected finding: blessing.okafor@moveops.com. Needed as the sender for the email to Chloe.
OE 16: Update Airtable relocation record for Raj Patel using airtable_update_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01", records: [{id: "recRajPatelChicagoDenver", fields: {Status or Notes updated with blockers found during investigation, e.g., IT security escort confirmation status, Swift hazmat acceptance status, DOT transport plan status}}]).
OE 17: Update Airtable relocation record for Emilia Cruz using airtable_update_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01", records: [{id: "recEmiliaCruzChicagoDenver", fields: {Status or Notes updated with piano damage status, insurance claim status ($1,200 rider), and any outstanding blockers}}]).
OE 18: Update or correct the Lily Marchetti Airtable relocation record to reflect the cancellation, using airtable_update_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_id: "tblRelocations01", records: [{id: "recReloc00000002", fields: {Status: "Cancelled"}}]) or similar correction to resolve the data inconsistency.
OE 19: Close Linear ticket #304 (issue_canopy_marchetti_apt, "Apartment Search - Lily Marchetti") using linear_update_issue (id: "issue_canopy_marchetti_apt", state: "state_done" or similar closed state).
OE 20: Close Linear ticket #305 (issue_canopy_marchetti_flight, "Flight Booking - Lily Marchetti") using linear_update_issue (id: "issue_canopy_marchetti_flight", state: "state_done" or similar closed state).
OE 21: Close Linear ticket #306 (issue_canopy_marchetti_movers, "Moving Coordination - Lily Marchetti") using linear_update_issue (id: "issue_canopy_marchetti_movers", state: "state_done" or similar closed state).
OE 22: Send email to Chloe Vance from Blessing Okafor using send_email (sender: "blessing.okafor@moveops.com", recipients: ["chloe.vance@moveops.com"], subject: relating to NorthWind Denver status or similar, content: covering (a) Raj Patel server lab status, chain-of-custody requirements, Victor Huang IT escort status, Swift hazmat acceptance status, DOT transport plan status, and identified blockers; (b) Emilia Cruz piano damage status, KeyMove damage, $1,200 insurance claim rider status, outstanding items; (c) NorthWind account context, Pam Kowalski watching, Q1 CSAT 5/10, risk assessment; (d) Marchetti records cleaned up, stale tickets closed, relocation record corrected, Heartland never acknowledged the cancellation).
OE 23: Create a Linear ticket for a NorthWind coordination gap that does not already have a tracking ticket, using linear_create_issue (team: "team_operations" or "Operations", title: relating to an identified NorthWind coordination gap, e.g., "Emilia Cruz piano damage resolution and insurance claim tracking" or "NorthWind Denver expansion - outstanding vendor and logistics coordination" or similar, description: specifics of the gap, priority: appropriate level, assignee: ops team member or unassigned).

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

OE 1: Search emails for NorthWind, Raj Patel, Victor Huang, chain-of-custody, and related terms using search_emails (query: "NorthWind" or "Raj Patel" or "Victor Huang" or "chain-of-custody" or similar). Expected findings: Catalina's NorthWind account update email (email_catalina_david_northwind_update) confirming Blessing assigned as coordinator for both Denver moves, Chloe's assignment emails referencing the chain-of-custody requirement and Victor Huang's IT security escort, and any vendor correspondence with Swift about hazmat handling. Also finds Victor Huang's security breach email regarding the Raj Patel server lab relocation referenced in the NorthWind retention Linear ticket.
OE 2: Search emails for Emilia Cruz, KeyMove, Craig Nguyen, piano, Steinway, and related terms using search_emails (query: "Emilia Cruz" or "Craig Nguyen" or "KeyMove" or "piano" or "Steinway" or similar). OE 3: Search emails for Lily Marchetti, Heartland, Jake Loomis, and cancellation-related terms using search_emails (query: "Lily Marchetti" or "Heartland" or "Jake Loomis" or "Marchetti cancellation" or similar). Expected findings: The original cancellation email sent to Jake Loomis on February 10, 2026, and critically, NO acknowledgment reply from Heartland Movers. Also finds references to the Heartland Q1 billing dispute (HM-2026-Q1-0042) where the Marchetti line item ($1,600) is one of three disputed charges.
OE 4: Search Slack for NorthWind, chain-of-custody, piano, Emilia Cruz, and Raj Patel discussions using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "NorthWind" or "chain-of-custody" or "piano" or "Emilia Cruz" or "Raj Patel" or similar). Expected findings: Blessing's April 12 admission of responsibility for the piano damage in #operations (ts=1775976300.000000), Blessing's April 13 note about Swift driver pushback on new DOT paperwork (ts=1776071700.000000), Chloe's April 10 response to Catalina with vendor assessment for both NorthWind Denver moves, confirming Blessing as coordinator and noting Swift capabilities and chain-of-custody gaps (ts=1775858880.000000), Catalina's April 11 NorthWind account recovery post in #customer-engagement, and the NorthWind retention discussion in #executive.
OE 5: Search CRM for NorthWind Technologies company record using crm_search_companies (name: "NorthWind" or "NorthWind Technologies"). OE 6: Search CRM for NorthWind deals using crm_search_deals (dealname: "NorthWind" or company_id from OE 5 result). Expected findings: deal_northwind_denver_expansion_v2 ($14,700, contractSent, Raj Patel + Emilia Cruz), deal_northwind (original $60,000 enterprise deal), deal_northwind_won (same deal at closedWon), and deal_northwind_denver_expansion (earlier version of the Denver deal at qualifiedToBuy, $14,700). The Denver expansion v2 deal description contains the full scope: chain-of-custody protocol, Gentle Giant Piano Movers subcontractor (no existing vendor agreement), $1,700 in provisional line items ($1,200 chain-of-custody protocol estimate + $500 lease negotiation, both pending vendor/scope confirmation), and NorthWind Q1 CSAT 5/10 account recovery context.
OE 7: List CRM engagements for NorthWind using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: [company_northwind]). Expected findings: eng_northwind_denver_recovery_context, confirms Blessing Okafor as coordinator for both NorthWind Denver moves, Q1 CSAT 5/10, Pam Kowalski escalated to David Chen, chain-of-custody protocol unprecedented for MoveOps, Gentle Giant Piano Movers has no existing vendor agreement, 27-day lease overlap, Catalina Dubois as AM.
OE 8: Search Airtable for Raj Patel relocation record using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Raj Patel"). Expected findings: recRajPatelChicagoDenver, Status: In Progress, Chicago to Denver, April 21-23, Special Requirements: 4 rack-mounted servers (~2,400 lbs), lithium UPS batteries requiring Class 9 hazmat handling and DOT-certified transport, CISO-mandated chain-of-custody log, NorthWind IT security escort must supervise all packing/loading, direct transport only (NO interim warehouse storage), real-time GPS tracking, full disk encryption verification before packing. Notes that MoveOps has NO prior chain-of-custody experience. Also returns a second record, recRajPatelAuditNote0411, showing Move Start Date: April 10 (vs planned April 21-23), Coordinator: Fatimah Al-Rashidi, and a critical note: "Escort confirmed for 9:00 AM — movers arrived at 7:00 AM and loaded without waiting." This audit record reveals the actual breach timeline and contradicts the planned dates in the primary record.

OE 10: Search Airtable for Lily Marchetti relocation record(s) using airtable_search_records (base_id: "appMoveOpsOps001", table_name: "Relocations", field_name: "Name", value: "Lily Marchetti" or "Marchetti").
